name: Sarika Rastogi
role: Program Director, CSR Strategic Projects, Genpact
body: Sarika is a Program Director at Genpact leading CSR strategic projects, climate programmes, and sustainability reporting. She earlier directed the Genpact Centre for Process Transformation in collaboration with Piramal Foundation, and is a Master Black Belt in process transformation. A gold medalist in business economics, she is also a dedicated student of Iyengar yoga.
